SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am12
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.CardDesign.GameCard

Class GameCard

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.CardDesign.GameCard.GameCard
public class GameCard extends Object
This class represents all the cards that are playable on the playing grid of the player and contains the methods which other parts of the model can use to extract info from the card

  • Constructor Details

    • GameCard

      public GameCard()

  • Method Details

    • getIndex

      public int getIndex()
      Returns:
      the index of the card

    • getValidSide

      public Side getValidSide()
      Returns:
      the playing Side of this card

    • getWhichSide

      public boolean getWhichSide() throws NullPointerException
      It returns a value to define which side of the card is played
      Returns:
      a boolean value: true if the valid side is the front one, false if it's the other one
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the valid side is not initialized

    • getCoordinates

      public Coordinate getCoordinates() throws NullPointerException
      Returns:
      the coordinates of the card
      Throws:
      NullPointerException

    • getColour

      public CardColour getColour()
      Returns:
      the card suit

    • getPoints

      public int getPoints()
      Returns:
      the points that the card gives when placed on the current playing side

    • isThereCorner

      public Boolean isThereCorner(int i) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException
      Checks if the chosen corner exists (if it is visible or not)
      Parameters:
      i - the position of the searched corner: 0 - represents the top left corner 1 - represents the top right corner 2 - represents the bottom left corner 3 - represents the bottom right corner
      Returns:
      true if there's an object corner on that position of the array, false if there's not
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException

    • getResourceCorner

      public Element getResourceCorner(int i)
      Gets the element of the corner chosen of the validSide
      Parameters:
      i - the position of the searched corner. It has to be a valid corner (not a hidden corner).
      Returns:
      the Element of the searched corner if there's one, null otherwise

    • getRequirements

      public int[] getRequirements()
      Gets the elements needed on the playingGrid to place the card on the validSide, if those exist
      Returns:
      an array of integers where every number represents how many element of a certain type is needed (array with the same order of the one returned by getResources)

    • getResources

      public int[] getResources()
      Extracts number of all type of resources of the valid side of this card, from the visible corners and from the center if it exists
      Returns:
      Array of integers, with each value representing the number of each type of element: position = 0 : n° of ANIMAL position = 1 : n° of FUNGUS position = 2 : n° of INKWELL position = 3 : n° of INSECT position = 4 : n° of MANUSCRIPT position = 5 : n° of PLANT position = 6 : n° of QUILL

    • getCondition

      public Condition getCondition()
      Gets the type of multiplying condition of the points of the validSide of the card, if it exists one
      Returns:
      the condition of the validSide if there's one, null otherwise

    • getCompletedObjFlag

      public boolean getCompletedObjFlag(int patternObjIndex)
      This method returns the boolean flag for the given pattern objective index
      Parameters:
      patternObjIndex - the index that identifies the pattern objective
      Returns:
      boolean value

    • setDefaultSide

      public void setDefaultSide()
      Method used by the previous one in the concrete classes to set the initial playing side as the front one

    • setValidSide

      public void setValidSide(Boolean side) throws NullPointerException
      Sets which of the sides of the card has to be the playing one
      Parameters:
      side - a boolean variable that if: - side = true, sets the front of the card as the playing side of the card - side = false, sets the back of the card as it
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the sides aren't created still

    • setCoordinates

      public void setCoordinates(int x, int y)
      sets the coordinates of the card
      Parameters:
      x - the x coordinate to set
      y - the y coordinate to set

    • setCompletedObjFlag

      public void setCompletedObjFlag(int patternObjIndex)
      This method marks this GameCard object as already used for a given pattern objective
      Parameters:
      patternObjIndex - the index that identifies the pattern objective
